description: A manager needs to place an employee on a PIP for failing to meet performance expectations.

nodes.task_description: Consult with the manager to document the specific performance issues and desired improvements.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP works with the manager to define clear, measurable goals for the PIP.

nodes.task_description: Draft the PIP document using the company's standard template.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP creates the formal PIP document.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a meeting with the manager and employee to deliver the PIP and have it signed.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP schedules and attends the meeting to ensure it's handled correctly.
